verses.1: His foundation is in the holy mountains.
verses.2: The LORD loves the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob.
verses.3: Glorious things are spoken about you, city of God. Selah.
verses.4: I will record Rahab and Babylon among those who acknowledge me.
verses.5: Yes, of Zion it will be said, “This one and that one was born in her;”
verses.6: The LORD will count, when he writes up the peoples,
verses.7: Those who sing as well as those who dance say,
